scripts.test:gate: npm run typecheck && node scripts/check-false-green.js && npx playwright test --config=playwright.ci.config.js
scripts.test:ops: npm run typecheck && node scripts/check-false-green.js && npx playwright test --config=playwright.ops.config.js
scripts.test:admin:gate: npm run typecheck && node scripts/check-false-green.js && npx playwright test --config=playwright.ci.config.js --project=admin-gate
scripts.test:admin:ops: npm run typecheck && node scripts/check-false-green.js && npx playwright test --config=playwright.ops.config.js --project=admin-ops
scripts.test:ci: npm run typecheck && node scripts/check-false-green.js && npx playwright test --config=playwright.ci.config.js
